title: StoreHeadInclusion
description: An RFC 6962 Merkle inclusion proof that a single correlation's leaf is committed under a chp-store-head-v2 root (chp-v0.2.md section 12, proposal 0019). A party holding only the signed/anchored root, the correlation's id and head_hash, and this proof verifies inclusion with no leaves snapshot and no witness: recompute the leaf hash from the correlation's leaf bytes up the audit_path and check it equals the root.

scheme.description: The store-head scheme this proof is for (RFC 6962 Merkle).

correlation_id.description: The correlation whose leaf inclusion is proven.

head_hash.description: The correlation's tail content_hash (the committed leaf value; null for a redacted head, folded as empty string).

leaf_index.description: The leaf's index among the sorted leaves.

tree_size.description: The number of leaves in the tree (correlations committed at the head's sequence).

audit_path.description: The RFC 6962 audit path: sibling node hashes bottom-up from the leaf to the root.
